chunks.title: Yahweh's Response to Solomon
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Yahweh responds to Solomon's dedication of the temple with conditions for blessing and warnings of judgment.

chunks.title: Solomon's Building Projects and Administration
chunks.reason: A narrative section detailing the completion of building projects, the exchange with Hiram, the use of forced labor, and religious observances.

chunks.title: The Ezion-geber Fleet
chunks.reason: A distinct narrative unit describing the construction of a naval fleet with Hiram's help and the return of gold from Ophir.
